name: Data Services ABAC Example Permission Definition

policies.name: User Has Global Link Write Right
policies.description: Check the current user has a role which has access right to write links.

policies.name: User Has Global Link Read Right
policies.description: Check the current user has a role which has access right to read links.

repositoryPolicies.name: No contracts of type Travel
repositoryPolicies.description: Disable the retrieval of contracts that are of type Travel via an ABAC rule

repositoryPolicies.name: All addresses but those in a certain city
repositoryPolicies.description: Disable the retrieval of addresses of a user specific city

repositoryPolicies.name: Contracts up to maxContractValue
repositoryPolicies.description: Disable the retrieval of contracts above a user specific max contract value

repositoryPolicies.name: BusinessPartners with income above some limit
repositoryPolicies.description: Disable the retrieval of business partners with income below user specific limit

permissions.name: Link Write Access
permissions.description: Check the current user has a role which has access right to write links.
policy-refs: User Has Global Link Write Right

permissions.name: Link Read Access
permissions.description: Check the current user has a role which has access right to read links.
policy-refs: User Has Global Link Read Right

permissions.name: Check query permission via ABAC
permissions.description: You can define permission rules for executing queries.
repository-refs: All addresses but those in a certain city
BusinessPartners with income above some limit
